arts.ttl: Chelsea star fires risky warning shot at PSG ahead of Club World Cup final
arts.sum: Champions League winners Paris Saint-Germain remain the team to beat at the Club World Cup with a £97million jackpot up for grabs - but Chelsea defender Levi Colwill is confident the Blues can upset the odds

arts.ttl: Chelsea ready to upset PSG in 'chess match' final
arts.sum: Chelsea coach Enzo Maresca said he will treat Sunday's Club World Cup final against Paris Saint-Germain "like a chess match."
